raw_consumer_statement:
I opened a XXXX XXXX XXXX Barclays credit card XX/XX/year> I purchased two {$100.00} gift cards and {$110.00} at XXXX XXXX. The fraud dept sent me another card & assured me that my card was secure. But it wasnt. I closed the account but could not get any statements because I kept getting locked out of my online account. 
Barclaycard sent me to collection even though they acknowledged the fraud. I need help with this and I would rather not have to spend money since I am a retired senior. But I refuse to pay for items I did not receive. Would you want to pay {$2200.00} for nothing? The investigation was not very good. They say a third party had my financial details as if I was to blame. So help me get the truth of this matter. Thank you
